name: Face-showing (talking head)
description: Creator regularly shows their face or speaks directly to the camera.

name: Faceless creator
description: Creator does not show their face, using product shots, hands-only, or stock footages.

name: POV-style
description: First-person point of view camera angle showing actions from creator's perspective.

name: Voice-over only
description: Video with a recorded vocal track explaining or narrating visuals.

name: Screen recording
description: Captures computer or phone screens, showing software, gaming, or app walks.

name: Animation / motion graphics
description: Uses drawn, animated, or motion design graphics instead of live footage.

name: Reaction content
description: Creator reacts to other videos, articles, memes, or news.

name: Commentary style
description: Opinionated discussions, video essays, or spoken reviews about trends or topics.

name: Vlog (daily life cam)
description: Casual, daily life, docu-style captures of creator's activities.

name: Cinematic / film style
description: High production value, artistic lighting, color grading, and camera work.

name: Live streaming
description: Real-time broadcasts or broadcasts recorded live from Instagram/Twitch/YT.

name: Short-form (Reels/Shorts/TikTok)
description: Short, snappy vertical videos under 60-90 seconds.

name: Natural hair
description: Focuses on wearing hair in its organic, un-straightened state.

name: Curly hair (3A–4C)
description: Covers curls, coils, kinks, and textures ranging from type 3A to 4C.

name: Hair growth & scalp health
description: Tips, products, and regimens for improving thickness, length, and scalp nutrition.

name: Hair coloring & dyeing
description: Showcases bleaches, dyes, temporary pigments, highlights, and home coloring tutorials.

description: Showcases cornrows, box braids, twists, and other protective hairstyles.
